notes: Typed chat now triggers Kabosu turns when it contains explicit Kabosu mentions.
REST chat bootstrap is stored as context without triggering historical turns.
Chat-originated turns reply through Vexa chat by default.
Voice-originated turns receive recent chat and shared URLs as LLM context.
Output routing supports explicit chat output and chat-plus-voice requests.
Obvious credentials are redacted from context before LLM use.
Compose now passes WAKE_CHAT settings into wake-orchestrator and the local Docker service was rebuilt and restarted.
